name: Cottonwood Valley Bank
description_short: Cottonwood Valley Bank is a community bank serving Kansas since 1914 with branches in Cottonwood Falls, Florence, and Lincolnville. They offer personal and business checking, online banking, and ATM access.
description_long:
Cottonwood Valley Bank has been operating since 1914, positioning itself as a longstanding community financial institution with the tagline 'Neighbors since 1914.' The bank serves rural Kansas communities across Cedar Point, Cottonwood Falls, Strong City, Florence, and Lincolnville through three physical branch locations and ATM networks.

The bank offers personal checking accounts with a $300 average balance requirement to avoid maintenance fees (waived with direct deposit), student checking for those 22 and under with no balance requirements, business checking accounts, online and mobile banking services, debit cards (MasterMoney/Shazam branded), and 24-hour ATM access. They provide tele-banking capabilities, e-statements, and standard banking features like check reordering and financial calculators on their website.

Cottonwood Valley Bank distinguishes itself through direct deposit fee waivers, student-friendly accounts with no minimums, and a mobile app available through standard app stores. They emphasize FDIC membership and equal housing lending practices. The bank operates with limited hours—reflecting small-town banking operations—with the main Cottonwood Falls branch open 9 AM-3 PM weekdays and Florence's lobby only 1-3 PM weekdays, though drive-up and ATM services extend availability.

As a small regional bank, CVB is best suited for customers in their service areas who value local relationships and community banking. However, the limited lobby hours and three-location footprint mean this bank is not practical for customers needing extensive branch access. The website currently shows technical errors on key pages, limiting ability to verify complete current service details.
services: Personal checking accounts with monthly statements
Student checking (age 22 and under) with no balance minimums
Online banking with 24-hour access and no fees
MasterMoney/Shazam debit cards with worldwide acceptance
pros: Direct deposit automatically waives monthly maintenance fees on personal checking
Student checking accounts with zero balance requirements for ages 22 and under
No foreign transaction or ATM fees at non-CVB ATMs with their debit card
24-hour ATM access with night depository at all three branch locations
Mobile banking app available through standard app stores
Free online and tele-banking services with no per-transaction fees
FDIC member bank with established 112-year history (since 1914)
cons: $300 minimum average balance requirement to avoid $5 monthly maintenance fees on personal checking
$9.95 annual fee on debit cards plus $30 replacement fee for lost cards
Very limited branch lobby hours (Cottonwood Falls 9 AM-3 PM, Florence 1-3 PM weekdays only)
Only three physical locations in rural Kansas with no geographic flexibility
Website currently showing application errors on multiple pages, affecting accessibility
best_for: Residents of Cottonwood Falls, Florence, Lincolnville, and surrounding rural Kansas communities
Students 22 and under seeking no-frills checking without balance requirements
Local business owners seeking community-based banking relationships
Customers who receive direct deposit and want to avoid monthly maintenance fees
diagnosis: Cottonwood Valley Bank is best for residents of its Kansas service areas who prioritize community banking relationships and don't need frequent branch access. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this bank only serves five small towns in rural Kansas, making it impractical for anyone outside those communities or those needing extended branch hours.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
